title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 625.091 - Bureaus or units of division
text:
625.091.  Bureaus or units of division. — The work of the division may be carried out through such bureaus or units within the division as may be established by the director, with the advice and approval of the commission.  There shall be one bureau or unit within the division charged with the development and promotion of the state's recreational advantages and facilities.
(L. 1961 p. 240 § 5(a))
